sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmad je jutros otišao na razgovor za novi posao.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmad went to a new job interview this morning.

sentences.arabic: ارْتَدَى مَلَابِسَ رَسْمِيَّةً وَأَجَابَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Obukao je formalnu odjeću i odgovorio na pitanja s velikim samopouzdanjem.
sentences.translationEn: He wore formal clothes and answered the questions with great confidence.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْمُدِيرُ مَسْرُورًا بِمَهَارَاتِهِ وَخِبْرَتِهِ السَّابِقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Direktor je bio zadovoljan njegovim vještinama i prethodnim iskustvom.
sentences.translationEn: The manager was pleased with his skills and previous experience.

sentences.arabic: يَنْتَظِرُ أَحْمَدُ الْآنَ اتِّصَالًا لِتَأْكِيدِ قَبُولِهِ فِي الْوَظِيفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmad sada čeka poziv kako bi potvrdio svoj prijem na posao.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmad is now waiting for a call to confirm his acceptance for the job.
